title: Cylindrical non-aqueous electrolyte secondary cell
abstract: The secondary cellâincludes an exterior can, a sealing body closing one end of the exterior can, an electrode group disposed inside the exterior can, and an insulating plate disposed between the sealing body and the electrode group. In the electrode group, a positive electrode and a negative electrode are wound in a spiral shape with a separator interposed between. The insulating plate is shaped as a disc having a lead hole penetrated by a positive electrode lead drawn out from the electrode group, and a center hole penetrating the center part of the insulating plate. The outer edge of the lead hole includes a curve part positioned along an arc that is concentric with respect to the outer circumference of the insulating plate as seen in plan view, and linear parts-positioned along a chord linking the two ends of the arc.
claims: 8. A cylindrical non-aqueous electrolyte secondary battery, comprising: an exterior can; a sealing assembly that seals one end of the exterior can; an electrode group disposed inside the exterior can; and an insulating plate disposed between the sealing assembly and the electrode group, wherein the electrode group includes a positive electrode and a negative electrode wound in a spiral shape with a separator interposed therebetween, the insulating plate has a disc shape having a lead hole through which a positive electrode lead that is drawn out from the electrode group penetrates and a central hole that penetrates a central portion, an outer edge portion of the lead hole includes, in a plan view, a curve portion and a straight portion, the curve portion is disposed along an arc concentric with an outer circumferential circle of the insulating plate, and the straight portion is disposed along a chord that connects both ends of the arc, wherein the arc is a minor arc that is smaller than a semicircle.
